steps.title: Find the causal signal
steps.content: The passage shows how different balance types determine what viewers perceive. “Therefore” signals that a photograph's message results from how it is balanced.

steps.title: Match the answer
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean dependent on or determined by — the passage shows how each balance type directly shapes what viewers perceive. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — Contingent on: what a photo conveys is "contingent on how it is balanced" — contingent on means dependent on as a condition, which captures that the message is determined by the balance type used. ✓
  • Choice B — Reserved for: what a photo conveys is "reserved for how it is balanced" — reserved for means set aside exclusively for, which implies restriction rather than a causal relationship. ✗
  • Choice C — Obligated to: what a photo conveys is "obligated to how it is balanced" — obligated to means bound by duty, which implies an obligation rather than a causal dependency. ✗
  • Choice D — Inhibited by: what a photo conveys is "inhibited by how it is balanced" — inhibited by means restrained or blocked, but balance shapes and determines the message rather than blocking it. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
